expression.expression: CAST((coalesce(CAST((CASE WHEN (F11 IS NULL) THEN F10 ELSE F11 END) AS DOUBLE), (REGEXP_SUBSTR((CASE WHEN (F11 IS NULL) THEN F10 ELSE F11 END), '^[0-9]+')), 0)) AS INTEGER)

condition.expression: ((NOT ((LOT IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(LOT)) = 0))) AND ((RECEIVED IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(RECEIVED)) = 0)))
